title: columnea lepidocaula
intro: Columnea lepidocaula, also known as the Hanging Goldfish Plant, is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its vibrant yellow and red flowers that dangle from its stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Columnea lepidocaula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically harvested, dried, and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
